Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant 5201 3rd Street, Llc And Mark Brennan To Further Respond To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JUAN JIMENEZ's Motion To Compel Defendant 5201 3rd Street, Llc And Mark Brennan To Further Respond To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents.

Given the lack of opposition to the requests for supplementation of Requests for Production, the Motion is granted. Defendant must serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at julia@campinsbenhambaker.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Julia Campins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant 5201 3rd Street, Llc And Defendant Mark Brennan To Further Respond To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JUAN JIMENEZ's Motion To Compel Defendant 5201 3rd Street, Llc And Defendant Mark Brennan To Further Respond To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories.

Defendant must produce verifications to the recently served discovery responses within 5 days. It appears at this time that the remainder of the motion is moot.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at julia@campinsbenhambaker.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Julia Campins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
